Example_EN: The council may reverse its earlier decision.
Example_CN: 议会可能撤销早先的决定。

Collocation: mode of transport;safe mode;in work mode
Example_EN: Cycling is a healthy mode of transport.
Example_CN: 骑自行车是一种健康的出行方式。

Collocation: look in the mirror;rear-view mirror;mirror image
Example_EN: She checked her hair in the bathroom mirror.
Example_CN: 她在浴室镜子前检查发型。

Example_EN: The food tasted awful after it burned.
Example_CN: 食物烧焦后味道糟透了。

Collocation: pose a threat;pose a question;strike a pose
Example_EN: Heavy traffic can pose a threat to cyclists.
Example_CN: 拥堵交通可能对骑行者构成威胁。

Example_EN: It took time to adjust to the new timetable.
Example_CN: 适应新时刻表花了一些时间。

Example_EN: She found a creative solution to the storage problem.
Example_CN: 她找到了存储问题的创意解决办法。

Example_EN: Nowadays many people work from home some days.
Example_CN: 如今许多人有些日子在家办公。
MemoryTip: now + a + days：当今这些日子。

Collocation: write a poem;love poem;read a poem
Example_EN: He wrote a short poem for his mother's birthday.
Example_CN: 他为母亲生日写了一首短诗。

Example_EN: Most agricultural land here is used for wheat.
Example_CN: 这里多数农业用地种小麦。

Example_EN: Our main competitor launched a cheaper product.
Example_CN: 主要竞争对手推出了更便宜的产品。

Example_EN: Drivers must not drink alcohol before driving.
Example_CN: 司机开车前不得饮酒。

Example_EN: The city hosts a famous music festival each summer.
Example_CN: 这座城市每年夏天举办著名音乐节。

Example_EN: Children should eat more fresh vegetables every day.
Example_CN: 孩子每天应多吃新鲜蔬菜。

Example_EN: The delivery van blocked the narrow street.
Example_CN: 送货车堵住了窄街。

Example_EN: She felt confident before the presentation.
Example_CN: 演讲前她感到自信。

Example_EN: Astronomers discovered a distant planet last year.
Example_CN: 天文学家去年发现了一颗遥远行星。

Example_EN: Drive slowly around the sharp curve ahead.
Example_CN: 前面急弯，请慢速驾驶。

Collocation: hurt your knee;knee injury;on your knees
Example_EN: He hurt his knee while playing football.
Example_CN: 他踢球时伤了膝盖。
MemoryTip: knee：腿部弯曲处（k 不发音）。

Example_EN: She worked hard to overcome her fear of speaking.
Example_CN: 她努力克服了害怕发言的恐惧。

Example_EN: She searched the Web for cheap train tickets.
Example_CN: 她在网上搜索便宜火车票。

Collocation: in depth;depth of;at a depth of
Example_EN: The lake reaches a depth of twenty metres.
Example_CN: 该湖深达二十米。

Example_EN: Please wait at the main entrance of the museum.
Example_CN: 请在博物馆正门等候。

Example_EN: Please keep a log of all customer complaints.
Example_CN: 请记录所有客户投诉。

Example_EN: The city built a giant new sports stadium.
Example_CN: 这座城市建了一座巨大的新体育场。

Example_EN: In many myths, a god rules the sea.
Example_CN: 许多神话里有一位掌管海洋的神。

Example_EN: Please give each child an equal portion of cake.
Example_CN: 请给每个孩子同等份量的蛋糕。

Example_EN: Do not mix unknown chemical substances at home.
Example_CN: 不要在家混合不明化学物质。

Example_EN: The storm caused extensive damage to coastal towns.
Example_CN: 风暴给沿海城镇造成大范围破坏。

Example_EN: Teachers help students interpret the exam results.
Example_CN: 老师帮助学生解读考试结果。

Example_EN: The country gained independence in the twentieth century.
Example_CN: 该国在二十世纪获得独立。

Example_EN: Please add less sugar to my tea.
Example_CN: 请少往我茶里放糖。

Example_EN: She rarely shares her inner feelings with strangers.
Example_CN: 她很少向陌生人透露内心感受。

Collocation: cause harm;do no harm;harm the environment
Example_EN: Plastic waste can harm the environment.
Example_CN: 塑料垃圾会损害环境。

Collocation: consult a doctor;consult with;consult a dictionary
Example_EN: You should consult a doctor about that cough.
Example_CN: 咳嗽了你应当去看医生咨询。

Example_EN: She wore a bright pink jacket to the party.
Example_CN: 她穿了鲜艳的粉色夹克去聚会。

Collocation: cast a shadow;in the shadow;shadow of
Example_EN: The tree cast a long shadow across the path.
Example_CN: 树在小路上投下长长的影子。

Collocation: a strip of land;comic strip;strip of paper
Example_EN: Cut a thin strip of paper for the bookmark.
Example_CN: 剪一条细纸条做书签。

Example_EN: The table has a smooth wooden surface.
Example_CN: 这张桌子有光滑的木表面。

Example_EN: Early intervention can improve a child's reading skills.
Example_CN: 早期干预可改善孩子的阅读能力。

Example_EN: Her calm speech impressed the whole committee.
Example_CN: 她沉着的发言给整个委员会留下深刻印象。

Example_EN: She is studying hard for the final exam.
Example_CN: 她正努力准备期末考试。

Example_EN: Smoking is a hard vice to give up.
Example_CN: 吸烟是难戒的恶习。

Example_EN: The company made a radical change in its strategy.
Example_CN: 公司对战略做了根本性改变。

Example_EN: Prices rose, and wages similarly increased.
Example_CN: 物价上涨，工资也同样增加了。

Example_EN: Please behave well during the school trip.
Example_CN: 校外活动期间请表现良好。

Example_EN: Please turn down the loud music at night.
Example_CN: 夜里请把嘈杂音乐调低。

Example_EN: Please check the exact dimensions of the box.
Example_CN: 请核对箱子的确切尺寸。

Example_EN: Subsequent events proved that the warning was right.
Example_CN: 随后的事件证明警告是对的。

Example_EN: Wash your hands to prevent infection.
Example_CN: 洗手以防感染。

Example_EN: Take a warm jacket because the evening will be cold.
Example_CN: 晚上会冷，带件暖和夹克。

Example_EN: Better planning can improve work efficiency.
Example_CN: 更好的规划可提高工作效率。

Example_EN: Please put the dirty clothes in the washing machine.
Example_CN: 请把脏衣服放进洗衣机。

Example_EN: One startling statistic showed rising youth unemployment.
Example_CN: 一个惊人统计数字显示青年失业率上升。
MemoryTip: statistic：一条统计数据（常复数 statistics）。

Example_EN: Try to exercise regularly at least three times a week.
Example_CN: 尽量每周至少定期锻炼三次。

Example_EN: They spent a week at a beach resort.
Example_CN: 他们在海滨度假村待了一周。

Example_EN: Please iron this shirt before the interview.
Example_CN: 面试前请熨一下这件衬衫。

Example_EN: The match will be broadcast live on national television.
Example_CN: 比赛将在国家电视台直播。

Example_EN: Club membership gives you free use of the gym.
Example_CN: 俱乐部会员资格可免费使用健身房。

Collocation: slice of bread;fresh bread;bread and butter
Example_EN: Please buy a loaf of fresh bread on your way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上请买条新鲜面包。

Example_EN: The bright headlights briefly blinded the driver.
Example_CN: 刺眼车灯短暂晃花了司机的眼。

Example_EN: Athletes need pure water in hot weather.
Example_CN: 运动员在炎热天气需要纯净水。

Example_EN: He had a bloody nose after falling on the playground.
Example_CN: 他在操场摔倒后鼻子流血了。
MemoryTip: blood → bloody：带血的；口语也表强烈语气。

Example_EN: Canada has long been a close ally of Britain.
Example_CN: 加拿大长期是英国的亲密盟友。

Example_EN: Buy rice in large quantity to save money.
Example_CN: 大量买米可以省钱。

Example_EN: Please bend down to pick up the paper.
Example_CN: 请弯腰捡起那张纸。

Example_EN: She showed a mature attitude during the crisis.
Example_CN: 危机中她表现出成熟态度。

Example_EN: Could you briefly explain the main idea?
Example_CN: 你能简要解释一下主要意思吗？

Example_EN: The fire alarm rang during the chemistry class.
Example_CN: 化学课上火警响起。

Collocation: disturb someone;sorry to disturb;disturb the peace
Example_EN: Sorry to disturb you, but the phone is ringing.
Example_CN: 抱歉打扰，电话在响。

Example_EN: The company hopes to sustain growth next year.
Example_CN: 公司希望明年保持增长。

Example_EN: A severe flood destroyed several village bridges.
Example_CN: 一场严重洪水冲毁了几座乡村桥梁。

Example_EN: Education can help families escape poverty.
Example_CN: 教育可帮助家庭摆脱贫困。

Example_EN: That is a crazy idea, but it might work.
Example_CN: 这主意很疯狂，但或许管用。

Example_EN: Always cite your sources in academic writing.
Example_CN: 学术写作中务必注明引用来源。

Example_EN: A newly opened cafe is popular with students.
Example_CN: 新开的咖啡馆很受学生欢迎。

Example_EN: The two roads run parallel for several miles.
Example_CN: 两条路平行延伸数英里。

Example_EN: The school promotes gender equality in sports.
Example_CN: 学校在体育中推动性别平等。

Collocation: sponsor an event;main sponsor;find a sponsor
Example_EN: A local bank will sponsor the school sports day.
Example_CN: 一家本地银行将赞助学校运动会。

Example_EN: Wear strong boots for the mountain walk.
Example_CN: 登山请穿结实的靴子。
MemoryTip: boot：长筒鞋；英式也指汽车后备箱。

Example_EN: Please give an accurate description of the missing bag.
Example_CN: 请准确描述丢失的包。

Example_EN: We bought the car from a local dealer.
Example_CN: 我们从当地经销商处买了这辆车。

Example_EN: Press the red button to stop the machine.
Example_CN: 按红色按钮可停止机器。

Example_EN: High rents place a heavy burden on young workers.
Example_CN: 高房租给年轻从业者沉重负担。

Example_EN: Camels can survive for days in the desert.
Example_CN: 骆驼能在沙漠中生存数日。
MemoryTip: 名词沙漠重音在前；动词遗弃重音在后。

Example_EN: He is a close team mate on the football side.
Example_CN: 他是足球队里亲密的队友。

Example_EN: We occasionally visit my grandparents on Sundays.
Example_CN: 我们偶尔在周日去看祖父母。

Example_EN: Major shareholders will vote on the merger next week.
Example_CN: 大股东下周将对合并投票。

Example_EN: She ate a large bowl of soup for lunch.
Example_CN: 她午餐喝了一大碗汤。

Example_EN: The scientist made an exciting discovery about sleep.
Example_CN: 这位科学家在睡眠方面有了令人兴奋的发现。

Example_EN: The plan met strong resistance from local residents.
Example_CN: 该计划遭到当地居民强烈抵制。

Collocation: take a bath;hot bath;run a bath
Example_EN: A hot bath can help you relax after work.
Example_CN: 下班后洗个热水澡有助放松。

Example_EN: The frequency of storms has increased this year.
Example_CN: 今年风暴出现频率上升了。

Example_EN: Do not criticize her in front of the whole class.
Example_CN: 不要在全班面前批评她。
MemoryTip: critic → criticize：指出缺点（美式拼写）。

Collocation: turn on the tap;tap water;tap on
Example_EN: Please turn off the tap after washing your hands.
Example_CN: 洗手后请关掉水龙头。

Example_EN: He is studying philosophy at university.
Example_CN: 他在大学读哲学。

Example_EN: She bit her lip to stop herself from laughing.
Example_CN: 她咬住嘴唇以免笑出声。

Example_EN: She attributes her success to hard work and luck.
Example_CN: 她把成功归因于努力与运气。
MemoryTip: 动词重音在后；名词重音在前。

Example_EN: I apologize for the late reply to your email.
Example_CN: 抱歉未能及时回复你的邮件。
MemoryTip: apology → apologize：表示歉意（美式拼写）。

Example_EN: The plan needs board approval before it starts.
Example_CN: 计划启动前须获董事会批准。
